title: Mario Bloopers: What if Luigi
description:
it's a remake of my first blooper but instead of mario it's luigi what a great idea i had huh made kind of differently

ENOUGH WITH THE TELLING ME THAT ISN'T LUIGI I KNOW THAT IT ISN'T I WASN'T TELLING PEOPLE THAT YOU CAN GET HIM!!!
I WAS MAKING A BLOOPER SO THAT PEOPLE WILL LAUGH AT
